Skip navigation Shop Tickets News Matches Palace TV Crystal palace Crystal palace News Matches Palace TV Teams Shop Tickets Crystal palace Login / Sign up Login / Sign up Glasner reflects on FA Cup anniversary & facing Brentford First-team JUST NOW Tomorrow is 17th May – a date which no Crystal Palace fan, or their FA Cup-winning Manager Oliver Glasner, will surely ever forget. Whilst the Eagles will face Brentford in the afternoon in their final away Premier League game of 2025/26, the day will also one mark one to the year since Palace’s players wrote themselves into club immortality with a 1-0 win over Manchester City at Wembley. Palace’s first-ever piece of major silverware was a landmark moment which sent ripples around the footballing world, whilst yielding the club’s first-ever European campaign

registryArticleSamples.textPreview: Glasner reflects on FA Cup anniversary & facing Brentford - News - Crystal Palace F.C. Skip navigation Shop Tickets News Matches Palace TV Crystal palace Crystal palace News Matches Palace TV Teams Shop Tickets Crystal palace Login / Sign up Login / Sign up Glasner reflects on FA Cup anniversary & facing Brentford First-team JUST NOW Tomorrow is 17th May – a date which no Crystal Palace fan, or their FA Cup-winning Manager Oliver Glasner, will surely ever forget. Whilst the Eagles will face Brentford in the afternoon in their final away Premier League game of 2025/26, the day will also one mark one to the year since Palace’s players wrote themselves into club immortality with a 1-0 win over Manchester City at Wembley. Palace’s first-ever piece of major silverware was a landmark moment which sent ripples around the footballing world, whilst yielding the club’s first-ever European campaign

registryArticleSamples.textPreview: Preview: Leeds United vs Brighton & Hove Albion - Leeds United leedsunited.com leedsunited.com Tickets LUTV News Tickets & Hospitality Men Women Academy Shop Events More... search trigger burger menu Previous Next Mens Preview: Leeds United vs Brighton & Hove Albion 16 May 26 Whites take on Seagulls at Elland Road. Share facebook x email Leeds United will face Brighton & Hove Albion in their final Premier League fixture on home soil this season at the weekend, knowing their top-flight status is already secure for next campaign. That confirmation came after West Ham United were beaten by Arsenal last time out but, despite safety being achieved, Daniel Farke’s Whites still showed great character to earn a point against Tottenham Hotspur on Monday evening. Behind in the capital, England international Dominic Calvert-Lewin made it 14 goals in all competitions as he despatched a second-half p

Share facebook x email Having guaranteed their Premier League status with games to spare, who better to be the exclusive matchday programme interview than the man who masterminded it, Daniel Farke? In our discussion with the boss, we looked back at a terrific first season back in the top-flight, highlighting key moments and the unwavering support of the Elland Road faithful. Share facebook x email Prior to Sunday’s Premier League meeting with Brighton & Hove Albion, Leeds United would like to remind supporters we have a zero-tolerance policy towards the use of any homophobic or discriminatory language, chanting, abuse or gestures and condemn this behaviour. Elland Road is once again sold out and as always we appreciate your amazing support. Following an incident of discrimination in March 2023, in our Premier League fixture against Sunday’s opposition at Elland Road, the club was fined £1

registryArticleSamples.textPreview: Preview: Leeds United vs Brighton & Hove Albion - Leeds United leedsunited.com leedsunited.com Tickets LUTV News Tickets & Hospitality Men Women Academy Shop Events More... search trigger burger menu Previous Next Mens Preview: Leeds United vs Brighton & Hove Albion 16 May 26 Whites take on Seagulls at Elland Road. Share facebook x email Leeds United will face Brighton & Hove Albion in their final Premier League fixture on home soil this season at the weekend, knowing their top-flight status is already secure for next campaign. That confirmation came after West Ham United were beaten by Arsenal last time out but, despite safety being achieved, Daniel Farke’s Whites still showed great character to earn a point against Tottenham Hotspur on Monday evening. Behind in the capital, England international Dominic Calvert-Lewin made it 14 goals in all competitions as he despatched a second-half p

Share facebook x email Having guaranteed their Premier League status with games to spare, who better to be the exclusive matchday programme interview than the man who masterminded it, Daniel Farke? In our discussion with the boss, we looked back at a terrific first season back in the top-flight, highlighting key moments and the unwavering support of the Elland Road faithful. registryArticleSamples.title: Elche CF–Getafe CF: Información de entradas para el próximo partido en el Martínez Valero
registryArticleSamples.textPreview: Elche CF–Getafe CF: Información de entradas para el próximo partido en el Martínez Valero | Elche CF | Web Oficial Skip to main content Elche CF–Getafe CF: Información de entradas para el próximo partido en el Martínez Valero Los abonados podrán adquirir hasta dos entradas adicionales a precio reducido para animar al equipo en la jornada 37 de LaLiga EA Sports elchecf Copiar enlace El Elche CF ha puesto a la venta las entradas para el encuentro que disputará en casa frente al Getafe CF , correspondiente a la jornada 37 de LaLiga EA Sports . El partido se celebrará el domingo 17 de mayo , a las 19:00 horas , en el Estadio Martínez Valero , en un duelo clave en el que el equipo se juega mucho y en el que el apoyo de la afición será fundamental para empujar hacia el objetivo en este tramo decisivo de la temporada . registryArticleSamples.title: Around 200 fans will accompany the team to Madrid
registryArticleSamples.textPreview: Around 200 fans will accompany the team to Madrid | Girona FC | Web Oficial Skip to main content Around 200 fans will accompany the team to Madrid The Club provides free buses for Members to travel Girona FC will have the support of 194 fans this Sunday in Madrid, in the match corresponding to the 37th league matchday against Atlético de Madrid. The match will take place at 7:00 PM at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano stadium, in a unified schedule. Out of this total, 114 will travel on buses organized and funded by the Club for Members, an initiative that reinforces Girona FC's commitment to its fans at a decisive moment in the season. The buses will depart tomorrow, Saturday, at 8:00 AM from the Montilivi stadium and will return to Girona once the match is over. The match in Madrid is of utmost importance, as the team is fighting to stay in the league, and the support of the fans will once

registryArticleSamples.title: Around 200 fans will accompany the team to Madrid
registryArticleSamples.textPreview: Around 200 fans will accompany the team to Madrid | Girona FC | Web Oficial Skip to main content Around 200 fans will accompany the team to Madrid The Club provides free buses for Members to travel Girona FC will have the support of 194 fans this Sunday in Madrid, in the match corresponding to the 37th league matchday against Atlético de Madrid. The match will take place at 7:00 PM at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano stadium, in a unified schedule. Out of this total, 114 will travel on buses organized and funded by the Club for Members, an initiative that reinforces Girona FC's commitment to its fans at a decisive moment in the season. The buses will depart tomorrow, Saturday, at 8:00 AM from the Montilivi stadium and will return to Girona once the match is over. The match in Madrid is of utmost importance, as the team is fighting to stay in the league, and the support of the fans will once
